name: PlacetoPay
description: Latin American payment gateway supporting multiple countries with unified checkout API and PCI-compliant infrastructure.

seo.title: PlacetoPay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: PlacetoPay: Latin American payment gateway supporting multiple countries with unified checkout API and PCI-compliant infrastructure.

when_to_use: Unified checkout API across multiple Latin American countries
PCI-compliant hosted payment page for LatAm e-commerce
Recurring billing for subscription products across LatAm

pros: Unified API across CO, EC, CL, PA
review.verdict: Reasonable LatAm multi-country gateway, though newer players like dLocal cover more ground with better DX.
review.best_for: Merchants consolidating Colombia, Ecuador, Chile, and Panama on one gateway
review.not_for: Teams needing pan-LatAm coverage or English-first docs
